title: Polikushka
writer: Nikolai Efros, Fyodor Otsep, Lev Tolstoy
actors: Ivan Moskvin, Vera Pashennaya, Evgeniya Raevskaya
plot: In 19th century Russia, peasant Polikei is sent by the wealthy landlady to town. Things start to get complicated and even tragic, when he loses the lady's money he was sent for.
